series_metadata.series_title: Equipment Requests and Information for retailer equipment
series_metadata.series_description: File contains copies of applications for new or additional equipment requests.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area for one (1) year, review for administrative value, if none, then destroy. ; Electronic: Digital copy will be kept in the system for life of equipment or until no longer needed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
